requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant — R-600a Flammable Refrigerant Handling and Charge Documentation (no EU-style F-Gas regime)
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂——R-600a可燃制冷剂处理及充注量文件（无欧盟式氟气体制度）
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑——R-600a可燃製冷劑處理及充注量文件（無歐盟式氟氣體制度）

summary.en: Pakistan does not operate an EU-style horizontal F-Gas Regulation with quota-based HFC phase-down for placing-on-market of products. For household refrigerators using R-600a (isobutane, GWP approximately 3, ISO 817 flammability class A3), the controlling requirement is the flammable-refrigerant safety provisions of the Pakistan Standard adopting IEC 60335-2-24 (its Annex for flammable refrigerants): maximum R-600a charge per appliance/room configuration, ventilation, and ignition-source controls. The refrigerant type (R-600a / isobutane) and charge quantity (grams) must be documented and marked on the appliance consistent with the adopted PS/IEC 60335-2-24 standard. At the national policy level, Pakistan is a Party to the Montreal Protocol and its Kigali Amendment and phases down HFCs through that framework (administered via the national Ozone Cell / Ministry of Climate Change), but this is a national gas-management programme, not a product placing-on-market F-Gas mark comparable to the EU. There is no PSQCA or NEECA refrigerant 'mark' separate from the safety standard's charge requirements.
summary.zh: 巴基斯坦没有欧盟式横向氟气体法规（不以配额制对产品上市进行HFC削减管控）。对于使用R-600a（异丁烷，全球变暖潜能值约3，ISO 817可燃性分类A3）的家用电冰箱，控制性要求是采用IEC 60335-2-24的巴基斯坦标准中的可燃制冷剂安全规定（其可燃制冷剂附件）：每种器具/房间配置的R-600a最大充注量、通风及点火源控制。制冷剂类型（R-600a/异丁烷）和充注量（克）须依据所采用的PS/IEC 60335-2-24标准在器具上记录和标识。在国家政策层面，巴基斯坦是《蒙特利尔议定书》及其《基加利修正案》的缔约方，并通过该框架（由国家臭氧办公室/气候变化部管理）削减HFC，但这是国家气体管理计划，而非类似欧盟的产品上市氟气体标识。除安全标准的充注量要求外，PSQCA或NEECA没有单独的制冷剂标识。
summary.zht: 巴基斯坦沒有歐盟式橫向氟氣體法規（不以配額制對產品上市進行HFC削減管控）。對於使用R-600a（異丁烷，全球暖化潛能值約3，ISO 817可燃性分類A3）的家用電冰箱，控制性要求是採用IEC 60335-2-24的巴基斯坦標準中的可燃製冷劑安全規定（其可燃製冷劑附件）：每種器具/房間配置的R-600a最大充注量、通風及點火源控制。製冷劑類型（R-600a/異丁烷）和充注量（克）須依據所採用的PS/IEC 60335-2-24標準在器具上記錄和標識。在國家政策層面，巴基斯坦是《蒙特利爾議定書》及其《基加利修正案》的締約方，並通過該框架（由國家臭氧辦公室/氣候變化部管理）削減HFC，但這是國家氣體管理計畫，而非類似歐盟的產品上市氟氣體標識。除安全標準的充注量要求外，PSQCA或NEECA沒有單獨的製冷劑「標識」。

standards_or_laws: Pakistan Standard adopting IEC 60335-2-24 — Annex for appliances using flammable refrigerants (R-600a charge limits, ventilation, ignition-source requirements)
ISO 817 — Refrigerants designation and safety classification (R-600a classified A3: lower flammability)
Montreal Protocol + Kigali Amendment — Pakistan HFC phase-down at national level (national Ozone Cell / Ministry of Climate Change) — not a product placing-on-market mark

summary.en: China addresses flammable-refrigerant safety for household appliances within GB 4706.13-2014, which incorporates R-600a charge and flammability provisions derived from IEC 60335-2-24, supported by GB 9237 (safety requirements for refrigerating systems, aligned with ISO 5149). China is likewise a Party to the Montreal Protocol and ratified the Kigali Amendment (June 2021), running its HFC phase-down through the Ministry of Ecology and Environment (MEE) — a national gas-management programme, not a product placing-on-market F-Gas mark. A Chinese R-600a refrigerator therefore already meets a charge/flammability baseline derived from the same IEC 60335-2-24 source as Pakistan's adopted standard, but the charge documentation must still be confirmed against the specific Pakistan-adopted PS/IEC edition and limits.
summary.zh: 中国在GB 4706.13-2014中处理家用器具的可燃制冷剂安全，该标准纳入源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a充注量和可燃性规定，并以GB 9237（制冷系统安全要求，参照ISO 5149）为支撑。中国同样是《蒙特利尔议定书》缔约方并已批准《基加利修正案》（2021年6月），通过生态环境部（MEE）执行HFC削减——这是国家气体管理计划，而非产品上市氟气体标识。因此中国R-600a电冰箱已满足源自与巴基斯坦所采用标准相同的IEC 60335-2-24来源的充注量/可燃性基线，但充注量文件仍须对照巴基斯坦所采用的具体PS/IEC版本和限值进行确认。
summary.zht: 中國在GB 4706.13-2014中處理家用器具的可燃製冷劑安全，該標準納入源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a充注量和可燃性規定，並以GB 9237（製冷系統安全要求，參照ISO 5149）為支撐。中國同樣是《蒙特利爾議定書》締約方並已批准《基加利修正案》（2021年6月），通過生態環境部（MEE）執行HFC削減——這是國家氣體管理計畫，而非產品上市氟氣體標識。因此中國R-600a電冰箱已滿足源自與巴基斯坦所採用標準相同的IEC 60335-2-24來源的充注量/可燃性基線，但充注量文件仍須對照巴基斯坦所採用的具體PS/IEC版本和限值進行確認。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — flammable-refrigerant (R-600a) charge and flammability provisions for household refrigerating appliances (derived from IEC 60335-2-24)
GB 9237 — Safety requirements for refrigerating systems (aligned with ISO 5149)
Montreal Protocol + Kigali Amendment — China HFC phase-down (ratified June 2021; administered by MEE)

gap.en: Because Pakistan has no EU-style F-Gas placing-on-market regime, the refrigerant gap for an R-600a refrigerator is narrow and is primarily documentation/verification rather than technology: (1) Charge verification — confirm the appliance's R-600a charge complies with the maximum limits in the Pakistan-adopted PS/IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant Annex, which depend on configuration; Chinese CCC test data, though derived from the same IEC source, should be checked against the specific edition/limits PSQCA references. (2) Marking/documentation — the refrigerant designation (R-600a / isobutane), charge weight in grams, and flammable-refrigerant safety markings must appear on the appliance and in the manual consistent with the adopted standard. (3) No HFC quota gate — unlike the EU, there is no product-level HFC quota/prohibition gate to clear at market entry; the Kigali phase-down operates as a national gas-management programme. If any export models use an HFC (e.g., R-134a), there is no EU-style placing-on-market prohibition in Pakistan, but the exporter should still confirm there are no national import controls on the specific refrigerant gas.
gap.zh: 由于巴基斯坦没有欧盟式氟气体上市制度，R-600a电冰箱的制冷剂差距较窄，主要是文件/核实而非技术：（1）充注量核实——确认器具的R-600a充注量符合巴基斯坦所采用PS/IEC 60335-2-24可燃制冷剂附件中的最大限值（取决于配置）；中国CCC检测数据虽源自相同IEC来源，仍应对照PSQCA参照的具体版本/限值核查。（2）标识/文件——制冷剂名称（R-600a/异丁烷）、充注量（克）及可燃制冷剂安全标识须依据所采用标准出现在器具和说明书上。（3）无HFC配额门槛——与欧盟不同，市场进入时无须通过产品级HFC配额/禁令门槛；基加利削减作为国家气体管理计划运作。若有出口型号使用HFC（如R-134a），巴基斯坦无欧盟式上市禁令，但出口商仍应确认对该特定制冷剂气体没有国家进口管控。
gap.zht: 由於巴基斯坦沒有歐盟式氟氣體上市制度，R-600a電冰箱的製冷劑差距較窄，主要是文件/核實而非技術：（1）充注量核實——確認器具的R-600a充注量符合巴基斯坦所採用PS/IEC 60335-2-24可燃製冷劑附件中的最大限值（取決於配置）；中國CCC檢測數據雖源自相同IEC來源，仍應對照PSQCA參照的具體版本/限值核查。（2）標識/文件——製冷劑名稱（R-600a/異丁烷）、充注量（克）及可燃製冷劑安全標識須依據所採用標準出現在器具和說明書上。（3）無HFC配額門檻——與歐盟不同，市場進入時無須通過產品級HFC配額/禁令門檻；基加利削減作為國家氣體管理計畫運作。若有出口型號使用HFC（如R-134a），巴基斯坦無歐盟式上市禁令，但出口商仍應確認對該特定製冷劑氣體沒有國家進口管控。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at appliance level via the adopted PS/IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant Annex (R-600a charge limits, marking); no EU-style product-level F-Gas placing-on-market mark — HFC phase-down handled nationally under Montreal Protocol / Kigali Amendment
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory at appliance level via GB 4706.13-2014 (R-600a charge limits); China HFC phase-down under Kigali Amendment administered by MEE — separate national programme

source.publisher: Ministry of Climate Change (Ozone Cell), Government of Pakistan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R-600a is well-positioned for Pakistan: there is no EU-style product F-Gas placing-on-market regime, and HFC phase-down is handled nationally under the Montreal Protocol / Kigali Amendment. The exporter's main task is to verify the R-600a charge against the Pakistan-adopted PS/IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant Annex limits and to document refrigerant type and charge weight on the appliance. Any HFC models face no EU-style placing-on-market prohibition, but confirm there are no national import controls on the specific gas.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R-600a在巴基斯坦条件良好：不存在欧盟式产品氟气体上市制度，HFC削减由国家依据《蒙特利尔议定书》/《基加利修正案》处理。出口商的主要任务是对照巴基斯坦所采用PS/IEC 60335-2-24可燃制冷剂附件限值核实R-600a充注量，并在器具上记录制冷剂类型及充注量。任何HFC型号不面临欧盟式上市禁令，但请确认对该特定气体没有国家进口管控。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R-600a在巴基斯坦條件良好：不存在歐盟式產品氟氣體上市制度，HFC削減由國家依據《蒙特利爾議定書》/《基加利修正案》處理。出口商的主要任務是對照巴基斯坦所採用PS/IEC 60335-2-24可燃製冷劑附件限值核實R-600a充注量，並在器具上記錄製冷劑類型及充注量。任何HFC型號不面臨歐盟式上市禁令，但請確認對該特定氣體沒有國家進口管控。
